case_title: ALEXANDRA BADDUKE VS. ALI R. SHAKOORI

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BADDUKE, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI R.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JAN-26-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI R.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-30-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE OF THE COURTROOM. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED, AND JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA BADDUKE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALI R. SHAKOORI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,350.00 FILED BY BADDUKE, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
